description: Style Note capris serve you well in summer and through the monsoons. With the approaching monsoon season, get prepared for all the splashes with these stylish capris for spykar. Pair these capris with colourful and bright tops and flip flops to get that monsoon look perfectly right. Product Details Blue washed capris, has a creased look above the pockets in front, distressed look at the hemline and on the pockets, low waist, buttoned and zipped closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets in front with a patch pocket inside the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with white stone and stitched detail Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% lycra Wash and dry separately Do not bleach Use warm iron Size and Fit Spykar Lianna Tight fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
